subcodes.first_line: O thou who voicest divine praise! Thy letter was perused, and from the meanings of its words wafted the utmost spirit and fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای الهی مکتوبت ملاحظه گردید و از معانی کلماتش نهایت روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @Imam Husayn
